name: jdy_list_roles
description: List all roles in the organization. Returns roles[] with role_no, group_no, name, type (0=regular, 2=external), status, integrate_id. Supports filtering by has_internal (self-built roles) and has_sync (synced roles). Rate limit: 30/s.

has_internal.description: 是否包含自建角色，默认true

has_sync.description: 是否包含集成角色，默认true
